blocks.text: Moroni₂ Quotes a Letter from Mormon₂: Moroni 8
An epistle of my father Mormon, written to me, Moroni; and it was written unto me soon after my calling to the ministry. And on this wise did he write unto me, saying:
Mormon₂ Writes about the Destruction of the Nephites
Moroni₂ Quotes a Second Letter from Mormon₂: Moroni 9
[Moroni2’s heading] The second epistle of Mormon to his son Moroni.
